tires_rims.spec_text: CAT 797F uses 6x 63" OTR tires (59/80R63). Inspect for cuts, bulges, tread depth, bead damage. Cracked rim = RED. Missing lug nuts = RED. Cords visible = RED. Tread depth below 40% = YELLOW.
tires_rims.procedure: SIS CAT 797F tire & rim inspection SEHS9031

dump_body.spec_text: Inspect dump body for structural cracks, liner wear, dents, hinge pin condition, tailgate latching. Body crack at pivot = RED. Liner worn through = YELLOW. Tailgate latch failure = RED.

hoist_cylinders.spec_text: Inspect 2x hoist cylinders for rod pitting, seal leaks, mounting pin wear. Active oil leak = RED. Rod pitting visible = YELLOW. Mounting pin play > spec = YELLOW.

suspension.spec_text: CAT 797F has 4 suspension struts (N2 over oil). Check ride height measurement, oil leaks at seals, nitrogen charge. Oil leak at strut = RED. Low ride height = YELLOW. Uneven ride height side-to-side = YELLOW.

engine.spec_text: C175-20 diesel (4000 HP). Oil level between MIN/MAX. No external oil leaks. Belt condition acceptable. Turbocharger secure, no shaft play. Filter service per schedule.
engine.procedure: SIS C175-20 engine daily inspection SEHS9600

cooling.spec_text: V-shaped radiator assembly. Coolant between MIN/MAX with engine cold. Milky = coolant/oil mix = RED. Radiator fin damage > 20% blockage = YELLOW. Fan shroud secure.

drivetrain.spec_text: Mechanical drive: torque converter + transmission + final drives. Check oil levels, external leaks, final drive housing cracks. Transmission oil leak = RED. Final drive oil level low = YELLOW.

brakes.spec_text: Wet disc brakes on all wheels. Inspect brake cooling lines, disc wear indicators, brake oil level. Brake cooling line leak = RED. Low brake oil = RED. Disc wear indicator triggered = YELLOW.

cab.spec_text: All gauges functional. Seat belt operational. Horn audible. Mirrors intact and adjusted. Windshield clear. ROPS/FOPS structure intact.

steps_handrails.spec_text: All access steps, ladders, and handrails secure. Bent/broken steps = RED (fall hazard). Missing grip surface = YELLOW. Platform grating secure.

frame.spec_text: Inspect main frame rails, cross members, welds for cracks. Any structural crack = RED. Surface rust = YELLOW. Pitting affecting structural integrity = RED.

hydraulics.spec_text: Inspect steering and hoist hydraulic hoses for abrasion, swelling, leaks at fittings. Active drips = RED. Minor seeping = YELLOW. Service interval: 4000h or 5 years.

exhaust.spec_text: Dual exhaust stacks. Check for excessive smoke color (black=fuel, white=coolant, blue=oil). Stack secure, no cracks. Heat shields in place.
